scope_summary.problem: Add native __future__ stdlib module with feature flag constants (requirements.md). No existing spec covers __future__ module.
scope_summary.success_criteria: Module registers as __future__, exports annotations/division/print_function/unicode_literals/with_statement/absolute_import as MbValue integers, follows register() + register_module() pattern per native-implementations.md.

out_of_scope: compiler directive behavior from future imports
